title: helichrysum gunnii subsp. paralium
intro: Helichrysum gunnii subsp. paralium, also known as the silver leaf everlasting or paralytic helichrysum, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its silvery-gray foliage and clusters of yellow flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Helichrysum gunnii subsp. paralium include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine and aromatherapy.
